serverInfo.name: Deckrun Free
serverInfo.description: Generate PDF slide decks from Markdown. No auth required. Free.

tools.name: get_slide_format
tools.description: Fetch the authoritative Deckrun slide format spec — layout tags, syntax rules, and example Markdown.

tools.name: generate_slide_deck
tools.description: Convert Deckrun Markdown into a public PDF (90-day URL). Returns slide count and warnings.
